message:
core: implement bd-1hi.15 fountain-coded snapshot shipping (§3.4.3)

SnapshotSender partitions database pages via partition_source_blocks(),
encodes each block as a changeset, and streams rateless-coded symbols.
SnapshotReceiver maps packets to blocks, performs progressive per-block
decode with ISI dedup, and supports crash-recovery resume via
serializable BlockResumeState/ResumeState.

13 tests including E2E sender-receiver roundtrip, resume after partial,
progressive receive, dedup, compliance gates, and property tests.

Closes: bd-1hi.15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
